prestazioni: Replace the original XPAG 1,250cc inline-4 engine (engine code: XPAG) with a fully built 1,950cc stroker version using a 78mm forged crankshaft from Cosworth, 83mm forged pistons from JE, and billet connecting rods from Cunningham. Pair with a custom billet aluminum cylinder head ported by Westlake Engineering, featuring oversized 45mm intake valves and 38mm exhaust valves, plus a custom camshaft profile from Kent Cams (280° duration, 0.450" lift) for high-RPM power delivery (target: 150+ HP at 6,500 RPM).

Install a custom dual-sidedraft Weber 48 IDA carburetor setup with velocity stacks and a custom intake manifold fabricated by TWM Induction, paired with a custom 4-into-1 stainless steel exhaust header from Janspeed Engineering and a 2.5" straight-pipe exhaust with a Scorpius Racing megaphone silencer for optimal scavenging and a signature 1950s race car sound.

Upgrade the stock 4-speed manual transmission with a close-ratio gearset from Quaife (1st: 2.92, 2nd: 1.88, 3rd: 1.32, 4th: 1.00) and a limited-slip differential from Salisbury (4HA model) with a 3.9:1 final drive ratio. Replace the stock clutch with a multi-plate sintered bronze unit from AP Racing (part #CP2625) for improved torque capacity and engagement under high-RPM conditions.
estetica: Replace the stock steel body panels with hand-formed aluminum panels from Williams & Pritchard, including a custom aluminum hood with a functional louvered scoop for carburetor clearance and heat extraction, plus aluminum doors and rear decklid to reduce weight by ~40kg. Finish in a period-correct British Racing Green with hand-painted gold leaf pinstriping by Signwriting Services Ltd.

Install a custom aluminum dashboard from Brooklands Gauges, featuring a full set of Smiths Chronometric instruments (0-120 MPH speedometer, 0-8,000 RPM tachometer, oil pressure, water temperature, and fuel level gauges) with black faces and white numerals. Add a custom MOMO Mod.70 steering wheel with a quick-release hub and a leather-wrapped rim in tan Connolly hide.

Fit a custom aero package from The Motor Racing Styling Co., including a hand-formed aluminum front splitter with integrated tow hooks, a rear ducktail spoiler in aluminum, and a set of 16" Minilite-style magnesium wheels (16x5 front, 16x6 rear) from Revolution Wheels, shod with Avon CR6ZZ vintage racing tires (5.50L-16 front, 6.00L-16 rear) for period-correct grip and aesthetics.
